prompt:
Ultra-realistic outdoor lifestyle portrait of a cheerful young woman sitting on a concrete ledge in a lush park, arms stretched wide in a carefree pose, one hand making a peace sign. She has long flowing dark hair, a bright natural smile, and a playful youthful energy. Wearing an oversized neon yellow cardigan with large buttons, a fitted white crop top layered over a black banded inner top, cream wide-leg drawstring pants, and delicate silver necklaces.
Beautiful spring garden setting with vibrant green trees, blooming yellow flowers, and a dramatic turquoise-blue sky filled with large soft clouds. Low-angle perspective, dynamic composition, fresh outdoor atmosphere, gentle breeze moving her hair and clothing. Bright natural daylight, soft shadows, vivid colors, dreamy yet realistic mood, travel photography aesthetic.
Shot on a full-frame camera, 35mm lens, f/2.8, ultra-detailed face, realistic skin texture, sharp focus, cinematic color grading, vibrant greens and blues, high dynamic range, professional fashion photography, candid moment, Instagram-worthy composition, photorealistic, 8K quality.
Negative Prompt:
blurry, low quality, low resolution, overprocessed skin, cartoon, anime, CGI, painting, extra fingers, deformed hands, distorted face, duplicate limbs, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text, cropped body, oversaturated colors, heavy noise, motion blur, unrealistic proportions, dull lighting, gloomy atmosphere.

promptZh:
超写实的户外生活肖像，拍摄了一位 开朗的年轻女性 坐在郁郁葱葱的公园混凝土边缘，双臂舒展，姿态无拘无束，一只手比着剪刀手。她留着飘逸的长发，笑容明媚自然，充满俏皮的青春活力。身穿 大号荧光黄开衫，配有大纽扣，内搭修身白色短款上衣和黑色束带内衣，以及奶油色阔腿抽绳长裤，佩戴精致的银色项链。
美丽的春日花园背景，绿树葱郁，黄花盛开，背景是充满戏剧性的青蓝色天空，点缀着大朵柔软的云彩。低角度拍摄，动态构图，清新的户外氛围，微风拂动她的头发和衣物。明亮的自然光，柔和的阴影，色彩鲜艳，梦幻而写实，具有旅行摄影的美感。
使用全画幅相机拍摄，35mm 镜头，f/2.8，超精细面部，真实的皮肤纹理，焦点清晰，电影级调色，鲜艳的绿色和蓝色，高动态范围，专业时尚摄影，抓拍瞬间，适合 Instagram 的构图，照片级真实感，8K 画质。
负面提示词：
模糊，低质量，低分辨率，皮肤过度处理，卡通，动漫，CGI，绘画，多余的手指，手部畸形，面部扭曲，肢体重复，人体结构错误，水印，Logo，文字，身体被裁剪，色彩过度饱和，严重噪点，运动模糊，比例不真实，光线暗淡，气氛阴郁。
